title: tanacetum pyrethroides
intro: Tanacetum pyrethroides, also known as Pyrethrum or Dalmatian Pyrethrum, is a perennial flowering plant belonging to the sunflower family. The plant contains pyrethrin compounds, which have been used for centuries for their medicinal and insecticidal properties. The medicinal properties of Tanacetum pyrethroides include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions, such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum pyrethroides, including infusions and tinctures, are often used to promote overall health and well-being, and to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and respiratory issues.
